evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system for 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking.

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Managed feature pipeline with ~200 features and A/B testing infrastructure
evidence.source_text: Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features) and the A/B testing infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline-online correlation analysis
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust. Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: Earned LangChain for LLM Application Development certification
Earned AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty
Technical stack includes Diffusion Models, TensorFlow, Weaviate, FAISS, Time Series, Elasticsearch
evidence.source_text: Skills: Diffusion Models (intermediate, 36mo, 14 endorsements); TensorFlow (expert, 84mo, 41 endorsements); Weaviate (advanced, 18mo, 11 endorsements); FAISS (advanced, 59mo, 37 endorsements); Time Series (intermediate, 36mo, 5 endorsements); Elasticsearch (expert, 53mo, 17 endorsements)
